name: Species Suggestion
about: Propose a new creature species

labels: species
---

## Species Name


## Family

- [ ] Cat
- [ ] Dog
- [ ] Exotic
- [ ] AI-Native

## Personality

What makes this creature unique? (2-3 sentences)

## Special Mechanic

What care mechanic makes it play differently from existing species? (e.g., "must play before feeding", "stats hidden until trust is earned", "3x clean effectiveness")

## Suggested Stats

| Stat | Value |
|------|-------|
| Feeding window | ___ hours |
| Hunger decay | ___/hour |
| Happiness decay | ___/hour |
| Trust speed | slow / medium / fast / instant |
| Tier | common / uncommon / rare / extreme |

## Appearance

What does it look like? (Used for pixel art generation)

## Why this species?

What gap does it fill? What kind of caretaker would choose it?
